context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct avro-confluent format (not plain avro) for Flink SQL Schema Registry integration, specifies the correct URL option, includes the right Maven dependencies and repository, and correctly configures key/value field disambiguation.

checklist.name: avro-confluent format used
checklist.description: pipeline.sql uses 'avro-confluent' as the value.format (not 'avro' or 'json') for the orders and customers tables

checklist.name: avro-confluent.url option
checklist.description: The avro-confluent format in pipeline.sql uses the option `value.avro-confluent.url` (or `key.avro-confluent.url`) — NOT `schema.registry.url`

checklist.name: flink-avro-confluent-registry dep
checklist.description: pom.xml includes a dependency on `flink-avro-confluent-registry` (groupId org.apache.flink)

checklist.name: flink-avro dependency
checklist.description: pom.xml includes a dependency on `flink-avro` (groupId org.apache.flink)

checklist.name: EXCEPT_KEY for value fields
checklist.description: The orders table definition uses `'value.fields-include' = 'EXCEPT_KEY'` to exclude the key field from the value

checklist.name: key.fields-prefix for key disambiguation
checklist.description: The orders table (with avro-confluent key) uses `key.fields-prefix` to distinguish key columns from value columns

checklist.name: Explicit key/value subjects
checklist.description: The orders table specifies both `key.avro-confluent.subject` = 'orders-key' and `value.avro-confluent.subject` = 'orders-value'

checklist.name: Upsert-kafka connector for customers
checklist.description: The customers table uses the 'upsert-kafka' connector (not plain 'kafka') since it has upsert semantics

checklist.name: Raw key for customers
checklist.description: The customers table uses `'key.format' = 'raw'` for the customer_id key

checklist.name: Schema Registry URL used correctly
checklist.description: All avro-confluent.url values in pipeline.sql point to http://schema-registry:8081 (matching the given endpoint)
